# Scoop Dogg — Dog Poop Cleanup Service, Ventura County, CA

## About

Scoop Dogg is a locally owned dog waste removal company serving Ventura County and nearby areas in California. Founded and operated by Josue, a Ventura County resident. Not a franchise. Every team member is background-checked and insured.

Phone: (805) 869-8070
Website: https://scoopdogg.net
Book online: https://scoopdogg.net/book

## Services

### Weekly Pooper Scooper Service
Regular scheduled yard scooping, same day each week. All waste double-bagged and removed from property. No contract. Cancel or pause anytime.
Pricing: 1 dog $15/week, 2 dogs $20/week, 3 dogs $23/week, 4+ dogs $25/week
Details: https://scoopdogg.net/services/weekly-pooper-scooper-service

### One-Time Dog Poop Cleanup
Full yard cleanup for overgrown or neglected yards. Handles any level of buildup. All waste hauled away.
Pricing: Standard yard $99, Heavy buildup $149, Severe/custom quote
Details: https://scoopdogg.net/services/one-time-dog-poop-cleanup

### Artificial Turf Deodorizing
Enzyme-based treatment for artificial turf, gravel, concrete, and natural grass. Eliminates urine odor at source. Pet-safe immediately after application.
Pricing: Small area (under 200 sq ft) $20, Medium (200-500 sq ft) $35, Large (500+ sq ft) $50+
Details: https://scoopdogg.net/services/artificial-turf-deodorizing

### Yard Deep Clean
Full turf restoration: deep brush, infill vacuum, pressure wash, heavy-duty enzyme deodorizer and sanitizer. Recommended 2-3 times per year.
Pricing: Under 500 sq ft $99, 500-1000 sq ft $149, 1000+ sq ft custom quote
Details: https://scoopdogg.net/services/yard-deep-clean

### Weekly Turf Maintenance
Ongoing artificial turf sweeping with the SwipeSmith turf sweeper plus enzyme deodorizing. Picks up leaves, twigs, pet hair, and debris weekly. Keeps turf looking and smelling fresh between deep cleans.
Pricing: Small area (under 300 sq ft) $35/visit, medium (300-600 sq ft) $50/visit, large custom quote
Details: https://scoopdogg.net/services/weekly-turf-maintenance

### Weekly Yard Maintenance
Ongoing yard maintenance — mowing, edging, hedge trimming, leaf cleanup, and general upkeep. Customizable to property needs. Same team, same day every week.
Pricing: Small yard from $40/visit, medium from $65/visit, large custom quote
Details: https://scoopdogg.net/services/weekly-yard-maintenance

### Kitty Litter Exchange
Fresh litter box service — used litter removed, box refreshed, surrounding area tidied. Weekly or as-needed. Litter can be supplied on request.
Pricing: 1 box $15/visit, 2 boxes $22/visit, 3+ custom quote
Details: https://scoopdogg.net/services/kitty-litter-exchange

### Dog Run Cleanups
Waste removal and odor control for side yards, gravel runs, artificial turf strips, and enclosed dog areas. Enzyme deodorizing available as add-on.
Pricing: Small run (under 100 sq ft) $49, medium (100-300 sq ft) $79, large custom quote
Details: https://scoopdogg.net/services/dog-run-cleanups

### Cat Tree Cleaning
Hair removal, surface wipe-down, odor treatment, and litter dust cleanup for cat trees and scratching posts. Pet-safe cleaning products.
Pricing: Small tree (1-2 levels) $25, large tree (3+ levels) $45, multiple trees custom quote
Details: https://scoopdogg.net/services/cat-tree-cleaning

### Pressure Washing
High-pressure washing for concrete, pavers, patios, and hardscape pet areas. Solid waste removed first. Water directed away from gutters and storm drains.
Pricing: Small area (under 200 sq ft) $59, medium (200-500 sq ft) $99, large custom quote
Details: https://scoopdogg.net/services/pressure-washing

### Kitty Litter Robot Cleaning
Deep cleaning for Litter-Robot and automatic self-cleaning litter boxes. Full teardown, globe cleaning, waste drawer sanitized, sensors cleared, carbon filter refreshed. Extends the life of your smart litter box.
Pricing: 1 Litter-Robot $45, 2 Litter-Robots $75, 3+ custom quote
Details: https://scoopdogg.net/services/kitty-litter-robot-cleaning

## Resources & Articles

Practical guides about dog waste, odor, local rules, and yard maintenance in Ventura County:

- Typical Dog Poop Cleanup Challenges in Ventura County
  Warm-weather odor, stormwater runoff, disposal rules, artificial turf smell, and drought landscaping.
  https://scoopdogg.net/resources/ventura-county-dog-poop-cleanup-challenges

- Dog Waste Disposal Rules in Ventura County
  How and where to legally dispose of dog waste — trash cans, green bins, storm drains, parks, and municipal rules.
  https://scoopdogg.net/resources/dog-waste-disposal-rules-ventura-county

- How to Clean Dog Poop from Artificial Turf in Ventura County
  Step-by-step guide for removing waste and odor from artificial turf, including enzyme treatment and infill care.
  https://scoopdogg.net/resources/clean-dog-poop-artificial-turf-ventura-county

- Dog Poop Cleanup in Drought-Tolerant Landscaping
  How mulch, decomposed granite, river rock, and native plants complicate cleanup — and what to do about it.
  https://scoopdogg.net/resources/drought-tolerant-landscaping-dog-poop-cleanup-ventura-county

- Dog Poop Laws in Ventura County (City-by-City)
  Local ordinances covering neighbor yards, sidewalks, parks, trash disposal, and storm drains across Ventura County cities.
  https://scoopdogg.net/resources/ventura-county-dog-waste-laws-by-city

- How to Clean a Smelly Dog Run or Side Yard in Ventura County
  Why confined dog areas smell worse, how to clean gravel and turf runs, and when to replace surface material.
  https://scoopdogg.net/resources/dog-run-side-yard-odor-cleanup-ventura-county

All resources: https://scoopdogg.net/resources

## Key Facts

- Serving Ventura County since business founded by local resident Josue
- No contracts, no sign-up fees, cancel or pause anytime
- Waste is double-bagged and removed from property entirely (not placed in customer trash)
- Gate secured after every visit
- Same-day text confirmation when service is complete
- Dogs can remain in yard during service (most visits)
- Aggregate rating: 5.0 stars (27 reviews)
